command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/9f_gen.py
python3 /tmp/9f_gen.py

git add docs/current-service-inventory.md docs/infrastructure-authority-map.md \
        docs/what-claude-built.md docs/service-migration-plan.md \
        docs/vm-role-boundaries.md docs/migration-rollback-plan.md
git status --short | grep "^A"

git commit -m "Phase 9F Infrastructure Authority Reconciliation — 6 documents from live inventory"
git tag Phase9F-InfrastructureReconciliation

git push origin main && git push origin Phase9F-InfrastructureReconciliation
git push github main && git push github Phase9F-InfrastructureReconciliation

echo ""
echo "=== VERIFY ==="
ls docs/*inventory* docs/*authority* docs/*migration* docs/*role* docs/*rollback* docs/what-claude*
git log --oneline -3
